title: (Bullish Signal) JOUT, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on January 04, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that JOUT's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 273 similar cases, 235 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $114.01 is above $92.00 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/01/20 - 01/04/21, the price experienced a +33% Uptrend. During the week of 12/24/20 - 01/04/21, the stock enjoyed a +4% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/3k20x4u8gk961.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=227e53f23488be5cdcff84b611622934c0173e84

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 04, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on JOUT as a result.  Tickeron A.I. detected that in 79 of 95 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

JOUT moved above its 50-day Moving Average on December 04, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for JOUT crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on December 11, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 14 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

Following a +4.92% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where JOUT advanced for three days, in 233 of 300 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 235 of 273 cases where JOUT Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 86%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8612423-johnson-outdoors-inc-ordinary-shares-s-jout-112-21-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-january-04-2021?utm_source=raddit&utm_medium=socail&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
